# [Clang] `clang::MemberPointerType::isSugared()` Assertion `!D1 == !D2` failed since `21.1`

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/175783
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer, regression:21
**Closed Date:** 2026-02-28T23:20:12Z

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 21.1.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/eW1T1zoKr
The assertion is same as #165997, but have different stack dump.

## Program
```cpp
namespace A {
  class B {
  public:
    virtual void foo();
  };
  void (*p)() = &A::foo;
} 
```

## Stack Dump
```bash
<source>:6:18: error: no member named 'foo' in namespace 'A'; did you mean 'B::foo'?
    6 |   void (*p)() = &A::foo;
      |                  ^~~~~~
      |                  B::foo
<source>:4:18: note: 'B::foo' declared here
    4 |     virtual void foo();
      |                  ^
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/AST/Type.cpp:5431: bool clang::MemberPointerType::isSugared() const: Assertion `!D1 == !D2' failed.
```
